# scripts

> The official public home of Opal scripts — a curated gallery, a
> TypeScript template, and a CI-gated contribution pipeline. One folder per
> script under `scripts/<id>/`; canonical API typings and a shared test stub
> live in `packages/`; `template/` is the copy-to-start scaffold.

Use raw/permalink URLs (`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/<path>`)
so a fetcher gets file content, not a rendered page.

## Docs

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/README.md): Overview, layout, install/create-a-script instructions, CI gates, full script table.
- [CLAUDE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/CLAUDE.md): AI guide — mental model, manifest schema, tools, test isolation model, pitfalls.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to add a script, PR workflow, review criteria, commit policy.
- [SECURITY.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/SECURITY.md): Sandbox model and vulnerability reporting.
- [CHANGELOG.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/CHANGELOG.md): Released and unreleased changes.

## Shared packages

- [opal-globals.d.ts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/packages/opal-types/opal-globals.d.ts): Canonical ambient type definitions for every scripting proxy global, including `storage`.
- [packages/stub/index.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/packages/stub/index.js): `createOpalStub()` — the shared sandbox stub every script's tests run against.
- [template/](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/template/src/main.ts): Copy-to-start TypeScript scaffold — a minimal typed script with settings, rendering, and `storage`.

## Scripts (scripts/<id>/)

- [`chomp`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/chomp/src/Chomp.js) ★ flagship (ui): Roguelite arcade micro-game for the command palette — rounds, perks, elites, mutators, meta progression, backed by a 326-check deterministic test harness.
- [`auto-tool-switcher`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/auto-tool-switcher/src/AutoToolSwitcher.js) (character): Best-tool hotbar switching using a facing heuristic.
- [`combat-hud`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/combat-hud/src/CombatHud.js) (combo): esp + player + world + rotation combat-awareness HUD, with a target health bar.
- [`day-cycle-clock`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/day-cycle-clock/src/DayCycleClock.js) (world): Dynamic Island clock converting `world.getTimeOfDay()` ticks into real time, with a day/night gradient bar.
- [`fall-warning`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/fall-warning/src/FallWarning.js) (character): Pre-landing fall-damage warning with an approximate damage estimate and screen-edge flash.
- [`ground-scanner`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/ground-scanner/src/GroundScanner.js) (combo): Vertical ground-gap scanner using `BlockPos` arithmetic.
- [`hud-panel-showcase`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/hud-panel-showcase/src/HudPanelShowcase.js) (ui): Pure renderer showcase — gradients, Path API, composite glow/shadow/blur effects, color helpers.
- [`look-assist`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/look-assist/src/LookAssist.js) (character): Smooth-look at the nearest living entity in FOV, composing the rotation anti-detection helpers.
- [`milestone-toasts`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/milestone-toasts/src/MilestoneToasts.js) (core): Edge-triggered toast notifications for fall survival, low/full health, and sprint streaks.
- [`module-guard`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/module-guard/src/ModuleGuard.js) (core): Configurable "disable Guard module while Watch module is active" pattern with auto-restore.
- [`name-tag-esp`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/name-tag-esp/src/NameTagEsp.js) (world): Floating nameplate-pill ESP tags that fade by distance.
- [`packet-no-fall`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/packet-no-fall/src/PacketNoFall.js) (character): Rewrites the movement packet's `onGround` flag while falling, rate-limited with `timer`.
- [`potion-alert`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/potion-alert/src/PotionAlert.js) (character): Active effects as a HUD column with expiry warnings, plus a nearby-combat-buff scan.
- [`reaction-tester`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/reaction-tester/src/ReactionTester.js) (ui): A reflex-timing mini-game hosted in the command palette.
- [`session-island`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/session-island/src/SessionIsland.js) (core): Dynamic Island showing session playtime and live enabled-module count.
- [`sprint-speed-hud`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/sprint-speed-hud/src/SprintSpeedHud.js) (character): Corner HUD with live speed number, sprint dot, and a fixed-timestep sparkline.
- [`stats-dashboard`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/stats-dashboard/src/StatsDashboard.js) (ui): Live, read-only stat-tracking dashboard hosted in the command palette.

## Optional

- [Issues](https://github.com/opalclient/scripts/issues)
- [Discussions](https://github.com/opalclient/scripts/discussions)
